dict.string: Rung reads your workouts, steps, mindful minutes, sleep stages, hydration, and body mass to auto-check matching habits the moment you finish them and to draw your daily energy curve. Your health data never leaves your account and is never shared with advertisers.
Rung does not write to Apple Health on iPhone or iPad — workouts started from Apple Watch are saved by watchOS so your iPhone can credit them automatically.
Rung sends habit reminders, streak-at-risk warnings, and accountability nudges from your mentor. You can disable any category in Account → Notifications.
Rung uses Screen Time limits to verify your social-media-detox habits each day. The exact apps you use are never sent to Rung — only whether you stayed under the daily cap you set.
Rung reads today's events on your local calendar so it can suggest a workout window between meetings and propose a streak freeze on packed days. Your event titles never leave the device.
Rung reads today's events on your local calendar so it can suggest a workout window between meetings and propose a streak freeze on packed days. Your event titles never leave the device.
